hints: add_contact is just two lines: book[name] = number, then return book. The bracket assignment both creates a new key and updates an existing one.
lookup should use book.get(name) — not book[name]. The .get() method returns None automatically when the key is missing, so you don't need an if-statement.
remove_contact should use book.pop(name, None). The second argument (None) makes it silent when the name isn't in the book. Without it, .pop() raises KeyError just like del would.
all_names should return sorted(book.keys()). This gives you a fresh sorted list; iterating book.keys() directly would not be sorted.
